entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used in the study for nodulation assessment

entities.name: NODULATION
entities.description: The process of forming nodules on the roots of a plant

entities.name: VISUAL RATING SYSTEM
entities.description: A system based on reference photographs using a 1-5 scale to estimate nodulation

entities.name: REFERENCE PHOTOGRAPHS
entities.description: Images used as a standard for the visual rating system to represent nodulation extent

entities.name: NODULE NUMBER
entities.description: The count of nodules on the roots used to validate the visual rating system

entities.name: NODULE MASS
entities.description: The weight of nodules on the roots used to validate the visual rating system

entities.name: HISAR
entities.description: One of the locations where chickpea genotypes were evaluated

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: One of the locations where chickpea genotypes were evaluated

entities.name: SOIL CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental factors that may influence the timing and estimation of nodulation
